titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Architecture, Yale University, Reminiscences and Documentation of Architecture Students Collected by Robert A. M. Stern
School of Architecture, Yale University, Reminiscences and Documentation of Architecture Students Collected by Robert A. M. Stern
titlestmt.author: compiled by Mayur Mehta and Richard Szary

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 7, 2021 at 10:17

did.unittitle: School of Architecture, Yale University, reminiscences and documentation of architecture students collected by Robert A. M. Stern
did.abstract: The material was gathered by Robert A. M. Stern for his article "Yale 1950-1965", published in Oppositions 4, October 1974, pp. 35-62. It includes letters and reminiscences from students who attended the Yale School of Architecture (formerly the School of Art and Architecture) in those years recalling their architectural education and how it influenced their subsequent careers, photographs and other images of their student and subsequent work, and copies of press releases, annual reports, catalogs, and other publications and documents relating to the school.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 18-H (YRG 18-H), Audi-visual materials and memorabilia documenting the Yale School of Art and Architecture and its predecessors.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were a gift of Robert A. M. Stern, 2005.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Architecture, Yale University, Reminiscences and Documentation of Architecture Students Collected by Robert A. M. Stern (RU 1001). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged alphabetically by alumni name.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The material was gathered by Robert A. M. Stern for his article "Yale 1950-1965", published in Oppositions 4, October 1974, pp. 35-62. It includes letters and reminiscences from students who attended the Yale School of Architecture (formerly the School of Art and Architecture) in those years recalling their architectural education and how it influenced their subsequent careers, photographs and other images of their student and subsequent work, and copies of press releases, annual reports, catalogs, and other publications and documents relating to the school.

corpname.part: Yale University. School of Art and Architecture

did.unittitle: Reminiscences and Documentation of Architecture Students
Baker, James. B. (personal statement and graphics)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

Yale University press releases (January 1954-June 1964) and Ingalls Rink article by Vincent Scully
